title: 6 Place Card Holders Christmas Bauble
description: A great addition to any Christmas collection, this place card holder is made from glass and metal and contains glitter star confetti, perfect for any festive table. Material: glass and metal. Approximate ball dimensions: 5.5 cm x 4 cm. Box dimensions: approx. 13 cm x 9 cm x 5 cm
